title: INtravel
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The dirty little secret behind my carry-on-only travel strategy
items.description: Here's a look at my best practices for the laundry-averse and how they make packing for trips as long as two weeks totally doable in a carry-on.

items.title: From TSA family lanes to play zones: How airports are making travel easier for families
items.description: An increasing number of airports now have spaces designated for children's entertainment.

items.title: Lovebirds can get a marriage license at this airport pop-up in Las Vegas
items.description: The Las Vegas airport operates a temporary marriage license bureau each February.
